calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Aug-29-2016 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from Department 501 for short cause trial/Prove Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: A. Mok, CSR: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.

Frank H. Kim, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff Eco Building America LLC.
Witness, Serghei Surdu, sworn and examined on behalf of the Plaintiff.
No appearance by or on behalf of Defendant Gordon Phillips aka Gordon Phillips, Jr.
Court ordered Defendants DOES 1-10 dismissed without prejudice.

Plaintiff's Exhibits:
1-Lease
2-Three Day Notice
3-Spreadsheet of payments
Court returned all Exhibits to Plaintiff.

After evidence and good cause appearing, the Court enters Judgment in favor of Plaintiff and against defendant as follows:
The Rental Agreement is canceled. The lease is forfeited.
Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 570 O'Farrell Street #116, San Francisco, California 94102 (City and County of San Francisco).

Damages $1930.00
Holdover damages $2984.44
Pre-judgment interest $0.00
Attorney's Fees $0.00
Costs $465.00
for a Total Judgment of $5379.44

Judgment signed in open court.

UD COURT TRIALS
Off Calendar Aug-29-2016 Assigned To Trial Court

REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818
